name: python3-json5
title: python3-json5
summary: manage data in JSON5 format in Python
description:
manage data in JSON5 format in Python
Reader and writer implementation for the JSON5 data format, mirroring
the standard Python JSON programming interface for ease of use.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use pyjson5 because manage data in JSON5 format in Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use pyjson5 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `echo '{foo:"bar"}' | pyjson5 --as-json` as documented upstream for pyjson5.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `pyjson5                                      April 2024                                  PYJSON5(1)` as documented upstream for pyjson5.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair pyjson5 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `pyjson5 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
